title: Employee Profile
description: This information will be used for payroll and taxes, so double-check that it's accurate.
selfOnboardingLabel: Invite this employee to enter their own details online.
selfOnboardingDescription: Your employee will be invited to enter their information on their own time.

personalDetails.title: Personal details
personalDetails.emailDescription: Use an email that's not associated with your company.

workDetails.title: Work details
workDetails.workAddressDescription: The primary location where the employee will be working.
workDetails.startDateDescription: Your employee's first day of work at your company.

homeAddress.title: Home address
homeAddress.description: Employee's home mailing address, within the United States.
homeAddress.courtesyWithholdingDescription: Withhold and pay local income taxes for employees who live and work in different states.

validations.INVALID_SSN_FORMAT: The SSN must be exactly 9 digits long, cannot contain all zeros in any group, and the first three digits cannot be '666' or in the range 900–999.
validations.INVALID_ZIP_FORMAT: Please provide a valid zip code
validations.startDateOutOfRange: An employee must have a start date that is within six months from today.
